zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Thomas Babington於1449年出生在英國德比夏爾德瑟其可時，他的父親Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston26歲，母親Lady Isabel De Bradbourne22歲。他於大約1475年與Edith FitzHerbert在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是12個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1518年3月13日在英國英格蘭德比夏爾德瑟其可享年69歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭德比夏爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Thomas Babington于1449年出生在英国德比夏爾德瑟其可时，他的父亲Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston26岁，母亲Lady Isabel De Bradbourne22岁。他于大约1475年与Edith FitzHerbert在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是12个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1518年3月13日在英国英格兰德比夏爾德瑟其可享年69岁，埋葬在英国英格兰德比夏爾。

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Thomas Babington was born in 1449, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, his father, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, was 26 and his mother, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, was 22. He married Edith FitzHerbert about 1475, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 12 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 13 March 1518, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 69, and was buried in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Thomas Babington est né en 1449, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Edith FitzHerbert environ 1475, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1518, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Thomas Babington 1449 in Dethick, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston 26 und seine Mutter Lady Isabel De Bradbourne 22. Er hat um 1475 in Derbyshire, England Edith FitzHerbert geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 13. März 1518 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Babington è nato il nel 1449 nel Dethick, Derbyshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Edith FitzHerbert circa 1475, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 13 marzo 1518, nel Dethick, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Babingtonが1449年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックで生まれた時，父Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingstonは26歳，母Lady Isabel De Bradbourneは22歳であった。約1475年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでEdith FitzHerbertと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1518年3月13日にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックで69歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Thomas Babington(이)가 1449년 영국 더비실르 데스이c크에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Isabel De Bradbourne(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1475년 영국 더비실르에서 Edith FitzHerbert(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1518년 3월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 데스이c크에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Thomas Babington nasceu em 1449, em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Edith FitzHerbert aproximadamente 1475, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1518, em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Thomas Babington родился в 1449 г. в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Edith FitzHerbert около 1475 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он умер 13 марта 1518 г. в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Thomas Babington nació en 1449, en Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Edith FitzHerbert aproximadamente 1475, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1518, en Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
